text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run into Tosen Jordan while taking care of an
errand in the library.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Groan... My head... I don't feel so good...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
My friend was just helping me study, and now my
head is killing me...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You know, I don't exactly love that reaction!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, my friend made time to help me study,
so I'm taking it seriously!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'm tired. I don't have time to deal
with you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Urgh! It's starting to throb again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Concerningly, her headache continues for a while
after that...
